# comfyui_stability_upscale_creative_node (Resource)

ComfyUI StabilityUpscaleCreativeNode node — Stability AI Upscale Creative [api node/image/Stability AI]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `creativity` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0.3
- `image` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING default:
- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 0

### Optional
